items.title: French man charged with locking son in van for more than a year
items.dek: The boy was found malnourished, naked, lying next to human excrement and unable to walk, the prosecutor said.
items.body: The boy was found malnourished, naked, lying next to human excrement and unable to walk, the prosecutor said.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Lebanon says ceasefire must be in place before Israel talks
items.dek: Lebanon will only take part in talks with Israel if a ceasefire is already in place, a senior official tells the BBC.
items.body: Lebanon will only take part in talks with Israel if a ceasefire is already in place, a senior official tells the BBC.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: South Korea deploys thermal imaging cameras in search for escaped zoo wolf
items.dek: The male wolf, named Neukgu, escaped a zoo in the central city of Daejeon on Wednesday, officials said.
items.body: The male wolf, named Neukgu, escaped a zoo in the central city of Daejeon on Wednesday, officials said.
items.author: IriLine Desk
